title: The Bremen Town Musicians
lines: An old donkey who had served his master faithfully for many years heard that his master planned to kill him.
He ran away and decided to go to Bremen to become a musician.
On the way he met an old hound who was also fleeing because his master no longer wanted him.
The donkey invited the hound to come with him to Bremen.
They continued together and met an old cat who had been chased away because she was no longer useful.
She joined them, and the three went on their way.
Soon they met an old rooster who was to be killed for soup.
He agreed to join the group.
As evening came, they came to a cottage where robbers lived.
The animals climbed on top of each other and looked through the window.
The donkey put his front hooves on the window sill, the hound jumped on the donkey's back, the cat climbed on the hound, and the rooster perched on the cat's head.
When the robbers saw the strange sight, they thought it was a ghost and ran away in terror.
The four friends went inside, ate a good meal, and settled down for the night.
In the darkness, the robbers thought the house was empty and tried to return.
But when they entered, the animals began their concert again, making such a terrible noise that the robbers fled in panic and never came back.
The four friends decided that Bremen and the road to it were not for them, for they had found a better home in the cottage.
And there they lived happily ever after.
